programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground in New York; Penny and Leonard discover they are uncomfortably similar to Amy's parents; Koothrappali insults physicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and starts a Twitter war.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon won't tell anyone why he's never mentioned Tam, his childhood best friend, Leonard takes matters into his own hands; Bernadette and Penny take Raj's fiancée out to dinner to get to know her.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy go crazy trying to figure out what "perfect gift" Leonard and Penny gave them for their wedding; Koothrappali decides to settle down and asks his father to arrange a marriage for him.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan avoids coping with a death in the family, only to be confronted by it head-on; Ben and Darlene address Ben's baby fever; Dwight gets the jitters when he has to fill in for the chef who suffers an accident.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy's parents and Sheldon's family arrive, everybody is focused on making sure the wedding arrangements go according to plan -- everyone except the bride and groom.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While the men attend a hockey game and end up at a hospital, the women spy on President Clinton's top aide, George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Chandler and Phoebe plan to dump dates on the same night at the same coffee house.

programme.sub-title: Alpha Males and the Power of Prayer
programme.desc: Mandy tries to make things right with Pastor Jeff when she learns her controversial comments have hurt the tire store's business; Jim and Audrey butt heads over Connor's allowance.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Mud Turtles, a Good Steak and One Man in a Tub
programme.desc: Becky thinks that Jackie's new friend, a restaurant supplier, is taking advantage of them; Darlene is thrilled when Harris gets into Central Illinois State, but Harris might have found a better offer; Dan finds himself in an embarrassing situation.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan avoids coping with a death in the family, only to be confronted by it head-on; Ben and Darlene address Ben's baby fever; Dwight gets the jitters when he has to fill in for the chef who suffers an accident.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent buys a big-screen television; Lacey buys jewelry from Wanda.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey learns what it means to be a victim of success when she invents a new sandwich that becomes a little too popular.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: The locals are confused about Wanda's PhD; Lacey gets mistaken for a cool adult by teens; Oscar finds something sinister about Davis and Karen.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Davis forgets Karen's birthday and rallies the gang to help him throw together a last-minute party with some unfortunate results; Oscar reckons with the fact that he's terrible at giving gifts.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan starts to bond with his younger half brother, but he can't get over the fact that their father paid for Ed Jr.'s college education, something he refused to do for Dan; Jackie hits it off with a fun married couple.

programme.desc: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend (Geoffrey Lower), whom everyone likes; Chandler starts smoking again; Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Wolowitz dresses up as Sheldon for Halloween, Sheldon seeks retaliation at Leonard and Penny's Halloween party; Leonard is shocked when Penny doesn't remember their first kiss.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is caught between a rock and a hard place when he becomes responsible for distributing extra grant money; Bernadette turns the backyard playhouse into a hideaway to get away from her husband and kids.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene, desperate for money, gets a job at Price Warehouse; Jackie decides to take her throuple relationship with Ron and Janelle to the next level; Ben shaves his beard in an attempt to appear more clean-cut to potential advertisers.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An agent (June Gable) offers Joey a movie role as Al Pacino's naked body double; Chandler dates a liberal woman (Sofia Milos).

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene, desperate for money, gets a job at Price Warehouse; Jackie decides to take her throuple relationship with Ron and Janelle to the next level; Ben shaves his beard in an attempt to appear more clean-cut to potential advertisers.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent installs a security camera at Corner Gas; Davis gets a stun gun.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: At bingo night, Wanda steps in after the regular bingo caller takes a tumble; she's a hit with everyone except Emma who takes drastic steps to restore her winning streak.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent gets his own private VIP section at the bar; Hank loses his keys and enlists Lacey's help to retrace his steps; Wanda attempts to retrain Davis's memory.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Davis accidentally totals the police cruiser and tries to cover it up; Hank and Wanda are tasked with making Dog River rat free; Emma struggles to get Oscar on board with spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Rob has never seen the show and Mike says it's his worst nightmare; different views in the Cash Cab; let's hope Darlene can balance these.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent installs a security camera at Corner Gas; Davis gets a stun gun.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bev is back from Arizona and realizes she'd like to use her finances to spread happiness; Bev decides to fund Mark's tuition to a prestigious coding camp, but Darlene tries to convince her to give the money to Harris instead.

programme.sub-title: One Bad Night and Chaos of Selfish Desires
programme.desc: Sheldon and Missy both run away from home together; Mary gets some upsetting news about her husband, George.
